space_control: Compute safe flood-fill territory estimates from current head position and all walls. Prioritize accessible unreachable space as a scaling metric—avoid dead-ends or corridors we can't defend. Weight this equally in the final vote.
combat: Detect immediate head-collision risks (1–2 moves ahead) and opportunistic kills; veto moves that guarantee loss, but enable aggressive plays when ahead in length. Balance caution with opportunism rather than pure safety.
food: Pursue nearest uncontested food that does not isolate remaining space or trap the body. Favor steady growth over reckless dives; coordinate with space_control to ensure feeding doesn't shrink our territory.
